span.p: Start: Logic Journey

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Foundation Level

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Basic Concepts
Copi & Cohen: Introduction to Logic
Hurley: Concise Introduction to Logic
Beall: Logic - The Basics

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Historical Context
Kneale & Kneale: Development of Logic
Jorgensen: History of Western Logic
Bobzien: Ancient Logic

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Propositional Logic
Goldrei: Propositional & Predicate Calculus
Kleene: Mathematical Logic
Grassmann: Logic & Discrete Mathematics

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Ancient Logic
Aristotle: Organon (Complete Works)
Corcoran: Ancient Logic & Modern Interpretations
Sandbach: The Stoics

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Predicate Logic
Enderton: Mathematical Introduction to Logic
Mendelson: Introduction to Mathematical Logic
Hamilton: Logic for Mathematicians

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Medieval Logic
Boehner: Medieval Logic
Rescher: Arabic Logic
Cambridge History of Later Medieval Philosophy

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Intermediate Level

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Modern Logic Revolution
Frege: Begriffsschrift
Russell & Whitehead: Principia Mathematica
Dummett: Frege - Philosophy of Language
Grattan-Guinness: Search for Mathematical Roots

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Set Theory & Foundations
Kunen: Set Theory - Independence Proofs
Hrbacek & Jech: Introduction to Set Theory
Halmos: Naive Set Theory

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Proof Theory
Takeuti: Proof Theory
Negri & von Plato: Structural Proof Theory
Gentzen: Collected Papers

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Mathematical Logic
Bell & Machover: Course in Mathematical Logic
Boolos, Burgess & Jeffrey: Computability and Logic
Marker: Model Theory - An Introduction

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Advanced Level

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Modal Logic
Chellas: Modal Logic - An Introduction
Blackburn, de Rijke & Venema: Modal Logic
Hintikka: Knowledge and Belief
Lewis: Counterfactuals

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Non-Classical Logics
Priest: Introduction to Non-Classical Logic
Rescher: Many-Valued Logic
Kosko: Fuzzy Logic - An Introduction
Troelstra & van Dalen: Constructivism in Mathematics

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Philosophical Logic
Burgess: Philosophical Logic - An Introduction
Sainsbury: Paradoxes
Blackwell Guide to Philosophical Logic
Haack: Philosophy of Logics

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Specialized Fields

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Computational Logic
Lloyd: Logic Programming
Wos et al: Automated Reasoning
Handbook of Automated Reasoning
Clocksin & Mellish: Programming in Prolog

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Category Theory
Mac Lane: Category Theory for Working Mathematician
Barr & Wells: Toposes, Triples and Theories
Lawvere & Schanuel: Conceptual Mathematics
Awodey: Category Theory

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Logic Applications
Huth & Ryan: Logic in Computer Science
Lappin: Formal Semantics
Stenning & van Lambalgen: Human Reasoning and Cognitive Science

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Contemporary Developments

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Quantum Logic
Beltrametti & Cassinelli: Quantum Logic
Nielsen & Chuang: Quantum Computation and Information
Dalla Chiara & Giuntini: Quantum Logic

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Algebraic Logic
Henkin, Monk & Tarski: Cylindric Algebras
Hirsch & Hodkinson: Relation Algebras
Németi: Algebraic Logic

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Cutting-Edge Research
Simpson: Subsystems of Second Order Arithmetic
Kohlenbach: Applied Proof Theory
Univalent Foundations Program: HoTT Book
Immerman: Descriptive Complexity

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Alternative Entry Points

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Mathematics Background
→ Start with Set Theory
